ddls:
CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the feature */,
  "setup_requirements" TEXT /* Setup requirements for implementing the feature */,
  "ui_considerations" TEXT /* User interface considerations for the feature */,
  "stability_rating_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stability rating */,
  "feature_set_power_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature set power rating */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the feature was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date for the feature */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for categorizing the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_feature_set_power_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_set_power_id") REFERENCES feature_set_power ("power_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_stability_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("stability_rating_id") REFERENCES stability_ratings ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bugs" (
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature associated with the bug */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bug */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bug (e.g., Open, In Progress, Resolved) */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date the bug was reported */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the bug (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to resolve the bug */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the bug was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature requested */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the requested feature */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the feature request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_requests_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Developer, Product Manager, User) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ui_considerations" (
  "ui_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UI record */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated feature */,
  "mobile_ui" TEXT /* Notes regarding mobile UI considerations */,
  "desktop_ui" TEXT /* Notes regarding desktop UI considerations */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the UI */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image illustrating the UI */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ui_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ui_considerations_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stability_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stability rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the stability rating (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stability level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_set_power" (
  "power_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the power level */,
  "power_level" TEXT /* Name of the power level (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the power level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("power_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated feature */,
  "user_engagement" REAL /* User engagement rate for the feature */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Error rate observed for the feature */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date for the metrics */,
  "average_response_time" REAL /* Average response time of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_metrics_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_logs" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change log entry */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., Addition, Update, Deletion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* The text of the feedback */,
  "submitted_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature integrated */,
  "integration_name" TEXT /* Name of the integration */,
  "integration_url" TEXT /* URL of the integration */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., View, Edit, Delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_category_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_category_links_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_category_links_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES feature_categories ("category_id")
)
